prompt_text:
### Demographics: 74-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily), Letrozole (2.5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 68.7 kg; Height 151.8 cm; BMI 29.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 136/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.6%; 9 months ago 6.2%; 6 months ago 6.4%; 3 months ago 6.2%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 170mg/dL; 9 months ago 156mg/dL; 6 months ago 155mg/dL; 3 months ago 146mg/dL; current 118mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 68.9kg; 9 months ago 66.7kg; 6 months ago 65.8kg; 3 months ago 63.1kg; current 68.7kg), Height (12 months ago 151.8cm; 9 months ago 151.8cm; 6 months ago 151.8cm; 3 months ago 151.8cm; current 151.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 28.0kg/m²; current 29.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 136mmHg; 6 months ago 134mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 136mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 73mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 130U/L; 9 months ago 125U/L; 6 months ago 111U/L; 3 months ago 113U/L; current 126U/L), AST (12 months ago 78U/L; 9 months ago 66U/L; 6 months ago 71U/L; 3 months ago 68U/L; current 74U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 50mg/g; 9 months ago 48mg/g; 6 months ago 49mg/g; 3 months ago 63mg/g; current 59mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 83mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 85mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 126mg/dL; 9 months ago 144mg/dL; 6 months ago 125mg/dL; 3 months ago 126mg/dL; current 137mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 15.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.2g/dL; 6 months ago 14.0g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 14.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
